summary: Started FR-3 deterministic local command router

Plan: (1) create local-command-router.ts with capture/move/status patterns and vault ops; (2) expose addMessage from useAgentMessages/useAgent; (3) intercept in useChatActions.handleSendMessage to route locally or escalate to Hermes
Attempt 2: router existed but not wired; also had TS1501 dotAll regex error
Plan: (1) fix duplicate ChatMessage import; (2) remove s-flag from regexes (TS target too old); (3) wire routeCommand in handleSendMessage before agent.sendMessage
Fixed regex flags, removed duplicate import, wired router into handleSendMessage with local fast-path and escalate fallthrough
WSL/Windows UI smoke requires live Obsidian window; gateway smoke 4/4 on retry (flaky mock server, pre-existing)
Build passed; gateway smoke 4/4; wsl-win smoke environment-blocked (pre-existing, not FR-3 regression)
FR-3 complete: local command router wired into handleSendMessage; capture/move/done/status route locally; all else escalates to Hermes
Attempt 3: verify implementation from attempt 2 is still complete and gate passes
Implementation verified intact: local-command-router.ts exists with capture/move/done/status handlers; useChatActions.ts routes locally or escalates to Hermes
Build clean: tsc -noEmit + esbuild production both pass
WSL/Windows UI smoke environment-blocked (OACTest Obsidian window not open); pre-existing, not FR-3 regression; gateway smoke 4/4
